A malicious or tampered challenge payload could cause challenge handling requests to be sent outside the intended Instagram host with the client\\'s existing session headers. Version 0.9.10 validates challenge paths before building URLs, solving captcha challenges, or submitting phone/SMS challenge forms.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00195, "percentile": 0.09217}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jh37-x3fv-4x72", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-23T00:11:53Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jh37-x3fv-4x72", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jh37-x3fv-4x72"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47157"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-11T18:16:26Z", "published_at": "2026-05-23T00:11:53Z", "references": ["https://github.com/subzeroid/aiograpi/security/advisories/GHSA-jh37-x3fv-4x72", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-47157", "https://github.com/subzeroid/aiograpi/pull/274", "https://github.com/subzeroid/aiograpi/commit/9c24151916beca622e588bfb3167c98711ff744f", "https://github.com/subzeroid/aiograpi/releases/tag/0.9.10", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jh37-x3fv-4x72"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/subzeroid/aiograpi/security-advisories/GHSA-jh37-x3fv-4x72", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/subzeroid/aiograpi", "summary": "aiograpi: Unsafe signup challenge path handling", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-12T19:25:42Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jh37-x3fv-4x72", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.9.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "aiograpi"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.9.10"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
